title: Rename Catalog to Inventory, Add Buy/Sell Price Fields, and Goods/Service Type Selector

requirements.text: Rename all occurrences of 'Catalog' / 'Katalog' to 'Inventory' across the entire application — including the sidebar navigation label, page title, route path, and any internal references.

quotes: halaman Katalog sebaiknya diganti dengan Inventory saja

acceptanceCriteria: Sidebar link reads 'Inventory' instead of 'Katalog' or 'Catalog'
The route path is updated to '/inventory'
Page heading on the page itself reads 'Inventory'
No remaining references to 'Katalog' or 'Catalog' appear in the UI

requirements.text: Add a 'selling price' (harga jual) and 'purchase price' (harga beli) field to the product/item data model in the backend. Both fields are required numeric values (in Rupiah). Update all add/edit dialogs in the Inventory page to include these two fields. Display both prices in the item list table.

quotes: di dalamnya diisi harga jual dan harga beli untuk keperluan laporan laba rugi

acceptanceCriteria: Backend product/item record includes 'sellingPrice' and 'purchasePrice' fields
Add and edit dialogs in Inventory page show labeled input fields for 'Selling Price' and 'Purchase Price'
Both prices are displayed in the inventory item list
Existing items without the new fields do not cause runtime errors (default to 0 or 0.0)

requirements.text: Add an item type selector ('Goods' / 'Service') to the product/item data model and to the Inventory add/edit dialogs. When 'Service' is selected, the qty (stock) field is hidden and treated as unlimited (no stock tracking). When 'Goods' is selected, the qty field remains visible and required.

quotes: ada pilihan barang atau jasa, untuk jasa qty dikosongkan karena jumlah unlimited

acceptanceCriteria: Backend item record includes an item type field with values 'goods' or 'service'
Add/edit dialog contains a type selector (e.g., toggle or dropdown) labeled 'Goods' / 'Service'
When 'Service' is selected, the qty/stock input field is hidden in the dialog
Service items display 'Unlimited' or '∞' in the stock/qty column of the inventory list
Goods items continue to show and require a numeric qty/stock value

requirements.text: Update the Profit/Loss (Laba Rugi) section in the Reports page to calculate profit using the selling price minus purchase price per item sold, aggregated across transactions in the selected period.

quotes: harga jual dan harga beli untuk keperluan laporan laba rugi

acceptanceCriteria: Reports page shows gross profit calculated as sum of (sellingPrice - purchasePrice) × quantity for all sold goods items
Profit/Loss figures are displayed in Indonesian Rupiah format consistent with the rest of the app
The calculation covers the same date filters used by existing daily/monthly report tabs

constraints: Do not modify files listed in frontend.immutablePaths
All Motoko logic must remain in backend/main.mo (single-actor architecture)
Preserve existing transaction history and cashier functionality
nonGoals: Redesigning the overall visual theme or layout
Adding new report types beyond profit/loss derived from buy/sell prices
